<!-- UI evidence must use synthetic content and contain no identifiable camera material. -->

## Impact review

- [ ] No privacy, camera lifecycle, offline-runtime, non-medical, or Cannot-assess invariant is weakened.
- [ ] Keyboard, screen-reader, zoom, reduced-motion, and non-color behavior was considered for UI changes.
- [ ] User, architecture, algorithm, privacy, data, testing, and troubleshooting docs were updated where behavior changed.
- [ ] No generated application/DMG, signing or notarization secret, personal camera material, raw landmarks, device identifier, username/home path, or unreviewed diagnostic is committed.
- [ ] New or changed assets/fixtures have original or documented licensed provenance and are not copied from SuperShrimp.

## Specialized changes

- [ ] **Scoring/calibration:** deterministic fixtures cover the change, threshold/user impact is explained, and language remains relative to personal calibration.
- [ ] **Data/schema:** forward migration and forced-failure rollback are tested and documented.
- [ ] **Dependency/model:** necessity, exact version/checksum, license/notices, security, performance, and platform impact are documented.
- [ ] **macOS distribution:** package changes keep unsigned local artifacts distinct from public signed/notarized releases; verify architecture, resources, permissions, Gatekeeper/signing evidence, checksums, upgrade/uninstall, and protected-secret boundaries as applicable.
- [ ] None of the specialized categories above applies.

## Contributor declaration
